description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named push CI CD that triggers on push to the master branch. Run two jobs: testing_job and build_and_publish_job. The testing_job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix of Python versions 3.9 to 3.13, checks out the code, installs dependencies, lints with flake8, tests with pytest, and uploads coverage to Codecov. The build_and_publish_job depends on testing_job, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies, builds the package, and publishes it to PyPI using a token from secrets.
